D1.name: context engineering
D1.evidence: AGENTS.md + 6 rules (always/glob) + 4 skills; negative rules present

D2.name: spec & traceability
D2.evidence: traceability gated in CI + commit-trailer convention enforced

D3.name: verification & gates
D3.evidence: gates run in CI + coverage/eval ratchet guards regression

D4.name: review / maker != checker
D4.evidence: distinct maker + checker agents, but review is advisory (not triggered)

D5.name: loop & orchestration
D5.evidence: binding git hook gates the loop (green before commit)

D6.name: memory & knowledge
D6.evidence: structured contract + AD/OQ intent ledger (no working handoff/snapshot)

D7.name: portability & tooling
D7.evidence: AGENTS.md + MCP + skills, but single agent-tool surface

D8.name: proof & observability
D8.evidence: UI-test MCP / transcripts configured; no asserted proof yet
